name: Peanut Butter Chiffon Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the first four ingredients together.
2. Slowly add water to the peanut butter and blend until smooth. Stir in the egg yolks.
3. Add the gelatin mixture. Cool and stir until the mixture thickens slightly.
4. Add vanilla and chill until partially set.
5. Beat egg whites to soft peaks, then add 2 tablespoons sugar, beating to stiff peaks. Fold into the first mixture.
6. Whip cream until stiff and fold into the pie mixture.
7. Slice a fully ripened banana (optional) and place it in the pastry shell.
8. Top with the filling and garnish with globs of whipped cream, each topped with a slice of banana.
